Patch Set 18:

To me the situation is simple.
"A stuff which doesn`t exist, cannot break".

E.g. 
We have an old component, which comes with a security issue, we don`t release new versions, but we keep a Helm Chart for it. Then, there might be someone able to enter such a component due to a securitry flaw, and make a mess on our system. I prefer to remove such components from Helm charts.

NO security issues, no performance issues, no deployment complexity, less load on servers, less to update as long as platform components are concerned (e.g. changes in common/shared Helm charts whic must be reflected).

If the component was there for Frankfurt, it will be there in Frankfurt branch of OOM.
